```{r include=FALSE}
# fwrite(bestMEM_AGB_Feld_ContSA,"bestMEM_AGB_Feld_ContSA_WC.csv")
# fwrite(bestMEM_AGB_Feld_ContAs,"bestMEM_AGB_Feld_ContAs_WC.csv")
# fwrite(bestMEM_AGB_Feld_ContOc,"bestMEM_AGB_Feld_ContOc_WC.csv")
# 
# 
# fwrite(bestMEM_AGB_Feld_RegAf,"bestMEM_AGB_Feld_RegAf_WC.csv")
# fwrite(bestMEM_AGB_Feld_RegSA,"bestMEM_AGB_Feld_RegSA_WC.csv")
# fwrite(bestMEM_AGB_Feld_RegAs,"bestMEM_AGB_Feld_RegAs_WC.csv")
# fwrite(bestMEM_AGB_Feld_RegOc,"bestMEM_AGB_Feld_RegOc_WC.csv")
```


##Importation
```{r include=FALSE}

#bestMEM_DBHqmAf<-fread("bestMEM_DBHqmAf_WC.csv")
#bestMEM_DBHqmSA<-fread("bestMEM_DBHqmSA_WC.csv")
#bestMEM_DBHqmAs<-fread("bestMEM_DBHqmAs_WC.csv")
#bestMEM_DBHqmOc<-fread("bestMEM_DBHqmOc_WC.csv")
#bestMEM_DBHqmNA<-fread("bestMEM_DBHqmNA_WC.csv")


#bestMEM_BAAf<-fread("bestMEM_BAAf_WC.csv")
#bestMEM_BASA<-fread("bestMEM_BASA_WC.csv")
#bestMEM_BAAs<-fread("bestMEM_BAAs_WC.csv")
#bestMEM_BAOc<-fread("bestMEM_BAOc_WC.csv")
#bestMEM_BANA<-fread("bestMEM_BANA_WC.csv")


#bestMEM_SDAf<-fread("bestMEM_SDAf_WC.csv")
#bestMEM_SDSA<-fread("bestMEM_SDSA_WC.csv")
#bestMEM_SDAs<-fread("bestMEM_SDAs_WC.csv")
#bestMEM_SDOc<-fread("bestMEM_SDOc_WC.csv")
#bestMEM_SDNA<-fread("bestMEM_SDNA_WC.csv")

#bestMEM_WDbaAf<-fread("bestMEM_WDbaAf_WC.csv")
#bestMEM_WDbaSA<-fread("bestMEM_WDbaSA_WC.csv")
#bestMEM_WDbaAs<-fread("bestMEM_WDbaAs_WC.csv")
#bestMEM_WDbaOc<-fread("bestMEM_WDbaOc_WC.csv")
#bestMEM_WDbaNA<-fread("bestMEM_WDbaNA_WC.csv")


#bestMEM_AGB_Feld_PanAf<-fread("bestMEM_AGB_Feld_PanAf_WC.csv")
#bestMEM_AGB_Feld_PanSA<-fread("bestMEM_AGB_Feld_PanSA_WC.csv")
#bestMEM_AGB_Feld_PanAs<-fread("bestMEM_AGB_Feld_PanAs_WC.csv")
#bestMEM_AGB_Feld_PanOc<-fread("bestMEM_AGB_Feld_PanOc_WC.csv")
#bestMEM_AGB_Feld_PanNA<-fread("bestMEM_AGB_Feld_PanNA_WC.csv")


#bestMEM_AGB_Feld_ContAf<-fread("bestMEM_AGB_Feld_ContAf_WC.csv")
#bestMEM_AGB_Feld_ContSA<-fread("bestMEM_AGB_Feld_ContSA_WC.csv")
#bestMEM_AGB_Feld_ContAs<-fread("bestMEM_AGB_Feld_ContAs_WC.csv")
#bestMEM_AGB_Feld_ContOc<-fread("bestMEM_AGB_Feld_ContOc_WC.csv")

#bestMEM_AGB_Feld_RegAf<-fread("bestMEM_AGB_Feld_RegAf_WC.csv")
#bestMEM_AGB_Feld_RegSA<-fread("bestMEM_AGB_Feld_RegSA_WC.csv")
#bestMEM_AGB_Feld_RegAs<-fread("bestMEM_AGB_Feld_RegAs_WC.csv")
#bestMEM_AGB_Feld_RegOc<-fread("bestMEM_AGB_Feld_RegOc_WC.csv")
```

#3. Multiple Linear Regression 

##3.1. DBHqm

###a) MLR Model with MEMs

```{r include=FALSE}


##Africa

#
DBHqmAf_F=lm(DBHqm~., data=bestMEM_DBHqmAf)
summary(DBHqmAf_F)


rse<-summary(DBHqmAf_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(DBHqmAf_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_Af[,mean(DBHqm),]
results<-tidy(DBHqmAf_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="SC",sub_rep="DBH_qm",area="africa",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]

results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15, slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)

test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(DBHqmAf_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "SC" , sub_rep = "DBHqm", area="africa",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(test)
rm(test)
##South-America

#
DBHqmSA_F=lm(DBHqm~., data=bestMEM_DBHqmSA)
summary(DBHqmSA_F)


rse<-summary(DBHqmSA_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(DBHqmSA_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_SA[,mean(DBHqm),]
results<-tidy(DBHqmSA_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="SC",sub_rep="DBH_qm",area="south_america",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15, slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)

test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(DBHqmSA_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "SC" , sub_rep = "DBHqm", area="south_america",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)

##Asia 

#
DBHqmAs_F=lm(DBHqm~., data=bestMEM_DBHqmAs)
summary(DBHqmAs_F)


rse<-summary(DBHqmAs_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(DBHqmAs_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_As[,mean(DBHqm),]
results<-tidy(DBHqmAs_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="SC",sub_rep="DBH_qm",area="asia",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15, slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)

test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(DBHqmAs_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "SC" , sub_rep = "DBHqm", area="asia",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)

##Oceania

#
DBHqmOc_F=lm(DBHqm~., data=bestMEM_DBHqmOc)
summary(DBHqmOc_F)


rse<-summary(DBHqmOc_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(DBHqmOc_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_Oc[,mean(DBHqm),]
results<-tidy(DBHqmOc_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="SC",sub_rep="DBH_qm",area="oceania",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15, slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)

test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(DBHqmOc_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "SC" , sub_rep = "DBHqm", area="oceania",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)


##north America

#
DBHqmNA_F=lm(DBHqm~., data=bestMEM_DBHqmNA)
summary(DBHqmNA_F)


rse<-summary(DBHqmNA_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(DBHqmNA_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_NA[,mean(DBHqm),]
results<-tidy(DBHqmNA_F, conf.int = TRUE) 

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="SC",sub_rep="DBH_qm",area="north America",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15, slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)

test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(DBHqmNA_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "SC" , sub_rep = "DBHqm", area="north America",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)
```


##3.2. BA

###a) MLR Model with MEMs

```{r include=FALSE}

##Africa

#
BAAf_F=lm(BA~., data=bestMEM_BAAf)
summary(BAAf_F)


rse<-summary(BAAf_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(BAAf_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_Af[,mean(BA),]
results<-tidy(BAAf_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="SC",sub_rep="BA",area="africa",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15, slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)

test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(BAAf_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "SC" , sub_rep = "BA", area="africa",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)


##South-America

#
BASA_F=lm(BA~., data=bestMEM_BASA)
summary(BASA_F)


rse<-summary(BASA_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(BASA_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_SA[,mean(BA),]
results<-tidy(BASA_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="SC",sub_rep="BA",area="south_america",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15, slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)

test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(BASA_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "SC" , sub_rep = "BA", area="south_america", pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)


##Asia 

#
BAAs_F=lm(BA~., data=bestMEM_BAAs)
summary(BAAs_F)


rse<-summary(BAAs_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(BAAs_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_As[,mean(BA),]
results<-tidy(BAAs_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="SC",sub_rep="BA",area="asia",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15, slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)

test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(BAAs_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "SC" , sub_rep = "BA", area="asia",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)

##Oceania

#
BAOc_F=lm(BA~., data=bestMEM_BAOc)
summary(BAOc_F)


rse<-summary(BAOc_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(BAOc_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_Oc[,mean(BA),]
results<-tidy(BAOc_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="SC",sub_rep="BA",area="oceania",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15, slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)

test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(BAOc_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "SC" , sub_rep = "BA", area="oceania",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)


##north America

#
BANA_F=lm(BA~., data=bestMEM_BANA)
summary(BANA_F)


rse<-summary(BANA_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(BANA_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_NA[,mean(BA),]
results<-tidy(BANA_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="SC",sub_rep="BA",area="north America",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15, slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)

test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(BANA_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "SC" , sub_rep = "BA", area="north America",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)


```


##3.3. SD

###a) MLR Model with MEMs

```{r include=FALSE}
##Africa

#
SDAf_F=lm(SD~., data=bestMEM_SDAf)
summary(SDAf_F)


rse<-summary(SDAf_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(SDAf_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_Af[,mean(SD),]
results<-tidy(SDAf_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="SC",sub_rep="SD",area="africa",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15, slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)

test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(SDAf_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "SC" , sub_rep = "SD", area="africa",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)


##South-America

#
SDSA_F=lm(SD~., data=bestMEM_SDSA)
summary(SDSA_F)


rse<-summary(SDSA_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(SDSA_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_SA[,mean(SD),]
results<-tidy(SDSA_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="SC",sub_rep="SD",area="south_america",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15, slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)

test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(SDSA_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "SC" , sub_rep = "SD", area="south_america",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)

##Asia 

#
SDAs_F=lm(SD~., data=bestMEM_SDAs)
summary(SDAs_F)


rse<-summary(SDAs_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(SDAs_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_As[,mean(SD),]
results<-tidy(SDAs_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="SC",sub_rep="SD",area="asia",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15, slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)


test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(SDAs_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "SC" , sub_rep = "SD", area="asia",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)

##oceania

#
SDOc_F=lm(SD~., data=bestMEM_SDOc)
summary(SDOc_F)


rse<-summary(SDOc_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(SDOc_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_Oc[,mean(SD),]
results<-tidy(SDOc_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="SC",sub_rep="SD",area="oceania",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15, slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)


test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(SDOc_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "SC" , sub_rep = "SD", area="oceania",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)


##north America

#
SDNA_F=lm(SD~., data=bestMEM_SDNA)
summary(SDNA_F)


rse<-summary(SDNA_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(SDNA_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_NA[,mean(SD),]
results<-tidy(SDNA_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="SC",sub_rep="SD",area="north America",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15, slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)


test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(SDNA_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "SC" , sub_rep = "SD", area="north America",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)


```

##3.4. WDba

###a)  MLR Model with MEMs

```{r include=FALSE}
##Africa

#
WDbaAf_F=lm(WDba~., data=bestMEM_WDbaAf)
summary(WDbaAf_F)


rse<-summary(WDbaAf_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(WDbaAf_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_Af[,mean(WDba),]
results<-tidy(WDbaAf_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="SC",sub_rep="WDba",area="africa",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15, slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)

test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(WDbaAf_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "SC" , sub_rep = "WDba", area="africa",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)


##South-America

#
WDbaSA_F=lm(WDba~., data=bestMEM_WDbaSA)
summary(WDbaSA_F)


rse<-summary(WDbaSA_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(WDbaSA_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_SA[,mean(WDba),]
results<-tidy(WDbaSA_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="SC",sub_rep="WDba",area="south_america",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15, slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)

test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(WDbaSA_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "SC" , sub_rep = "WDba", area="south_america", pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)



##Asia 

#
WDbaAs_F=lm(WDba~., data=bestMEM_WDbaAs)
summary(WDbaAs_F)


rse<-summary(WDbaAs_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(WDbaAs_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_As[,mean(WDba),]
results<-tidy(WDbaAs_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="SC",sub_rep="WDba",area="asia",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15, slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)

test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(WDbaAs_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "SC" , sub_rep = "WDba", area="asia",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)

##oceania

#
WDbaOc_F=lm(WDba~., data=bestMEM_WDbaOc)
summary(WDbaOc_F)


rse<-summary(WDbaOc_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(WDbaOc_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_Oc[,mean(WDba),]
results<-tidy(WDbaOc_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="SC",sub_rep="WDba",area="oceania",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15, slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)

test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(WDbaOc_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "SC" , sub_rep = "WDba", area="oceania",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)


##north America

#
WDbaNA_F=lm(WDba~., data=bestMEM_WDbaNA)
summary(WDbaNA_F)


rse<-summary(WDbaNA_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(WDbaNA_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_NA[,mean(WDba),]
results<-tidy(WDbaNA_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="SC",sub_rep="WDba",area="north America",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15, slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)

test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(WDbaNA_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "SC" , sub_rep = "WDba", area="north America",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)


```


##3.6. AGB_Feld_Pan

###a) MLR Model with MEMs

```{r include=FALSE}
##Africa

#
AGB_Feld_PanAf_F=lm(AGB_Feld_Pan~., data=bestMEM_AGB_Feld_PanAf)
summary(AGB_Feld_PanAf_F)


rse<-summary(AGB_Feld_PanAf_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(AGB_Feld_PanAf_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_Af[,mean(AGB_Feld_Pan),]
results<-tidy(AGB_Feld_PanAf_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="AGB",sub_rep="AGB_Feld_Pan",area="africa",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15, slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)

test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(AGB_Feld_PanAf_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "AGB" , sub_rep = "AGB_Feld_Pan", area="africa",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)





##South-America

#
AGB_Feld_PanSA_F=lm(AGB_Feld_Pan~., data=bestMEM_AGB_Feld_PanSA)
summary(AGB_Feld_PanSA_F)



rse<-summary(AGB_Feld_PanSA_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(AGB_Feld_PanSA_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_SA[,mean(AGB_Feld_Pan),]
results<-tidy(AGB_Feld_PanSA_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="AGB",sub_rep="AGB_Feld_Pan",area="south_america",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15, slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)

test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(AGB_Feld_PanSA_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "AGB" , sub_rep = "AGB_Feld_Pan", area="south_america",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)



##Asia 

#
AGB_Feld_PanAs_F=lm(AGB_Feld_Pan~., data=bestMEM_AGB_Feld_PanAs)
summary(AGB_Feld_PanAs_F)


rse<-summary(AGB_Feld_PanAs_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(AGB_Feld_PanAs_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_As[,mean(AGB_Feld_Pan),]
results<-tidy(AGB_Feld_PanAs_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="AGB",sub_rep="AGB_Feld_Pan",area="asia",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15,slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)

test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(AGB_Feld_PanAs_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "AGB" , sub_rep = "AGB_Feld_Pan", area="asia",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)


##oceania

#
AGB_Feld_PanOc_F=lm(AGB_Feld_Pan~., data=bestMEM_AGB_Feld_PanOc)
summary(AGB_Feld_PanOc_F)


rse<-summary(AGB_Feld_PanOc_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(AGB_Feld_PanOc_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_Oc[,mean(AGB_Feld_Pan),]
results<-tidy(AGB_Feld_PanOc_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="AGB",sub_rep="AGB_Feld_Pan",area="oceania",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15,slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)

test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(AGB_Feld_PanOc_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "AGB" , sub_rep = "AGB_Feld_Pan", area="oceania",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)

##north America

#
AGB_Feld_PanNA_F=lm(AGB_Feld_Pan~., data=bestMEM_AGB_Feld_PanNA)
summary(AGB_Feld_PanNA_F)


rse<-summary(AGB_Feld_PanNA_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(AGB_Feld_PanNA_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_NA[,mean(AGB_Feld_Pan),]
results<-tidy(AGB_Feld_PanNA_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="AGB",sub_rep="AGB_Feld_Pan",area="north America",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15,slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)

test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(AGB_Feld_PanNA_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "AGB" , sub_rep = "AGB_Feld_Pan", area="north America",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)


```


##3.7. AGB_Feld_Cont

###a) MLR Model with MEMs

```{r include=FALSE}
##Africa

#
AGB_Feld_ContAf_F=lm(AGB_Feld_Cont~., data=bestMEM_AGB_Feld_ContAf)
summary(AGB_Feld_ContAf_F)

rse<-summary(AGB_Feld_ContAf_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(AGB_Feld_ContAf_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_Af_AGB_Cont[,mean(AGB_Feld_Cont),]
results<-tidy(AGB_Feld_ContAf_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="AGB",sub_rep="AGB_Feld_Cont",area="africa",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15, slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)

test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(AGB_Feld_ContAf_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "AGB" , sub_rep = "AGB_Feld_Cont", area="africa",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)



##South-America

#
AGB_Feld_ContSA_F=lm(AGB_Feld_Cont~., data=bestMEM_AGB_Feld_ContSA)
summary(AGB_Feld_ContSA_F)

rse<-summary(AGB_Feld_ContSA_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(AGB_Feld_ContSA_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_SA_AGB_Cont[,mean(AGB_Feld_Cont),]
results<-tidy(AGB_Feld_ContSA_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="AGB",sub_rep="AGB_Feld_Cont",area="south_america",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area, Bio1, Bio12, Bio15, slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)

test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(AGB_Feld_ContSA_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "AGB" , sub_rep = "AGB_Feld_Cont", area="south_america",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)

##Asia 

#
AGB_Feld_ContAs_F=lm(AGB_Feld_Cont~., data=bestMEM_AGB_Feld_ContAs)
summary(AGB_Feld_ContAs_F)

rse<-summary(AGB_Feld_ContAs_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(AGB_Feld_ContAs_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_As_AGB_Cont[,mean(AGB_Feld_Cont),]
results<-tidy(AGB_Feld_ContAs_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="AGB",sub_rep="AGB_Feld_Cont",area="asia",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15,slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)

test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(AGB_Feld_ContAs_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "AGB" , sub_rep = "AGB_Feld_Cont", area="asia",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)


##oceania

#
AGB_Feld_ContOc_F=lm(AGB_Feld_Cont~., data=bestMEM_AGB_Feld_ContOc)
summary(AGB_Feld_ContOc_F)

rse<-summary(AGB_Feld_ContOc_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(AGB_Feld_ContOc_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_Oc_AGB_Cont[,mean(AGB_Feld_Cont),]
results<-tidy(AGB_Feld_ContOc_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="AGB",sub_rep="AGB_Feld_Cont",area="oceania",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15,slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)

test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(AGB_Feld_ContOc_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "AGB" , sub_rep = "AGB_Feld_Cont", area="oceania",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)

```

##3.8. AGB_Feld_Re


###a) MLR Model with MEMs

```{r include=FALSE}
##Africa

#
AGB_Feld_RegAf_F=lm(AGB_Feld_Reg~., data=bestMEM_AGB_Feld_RegAf)
summary(AGB_Feld_RegAf_F)


rse<-summary(AGB_Feld_RegAf_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(AGB_Feld_RegAf_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_Af_AGB_Reg[,mean(AGB_Feld_Reg),]
results<-tidy(AGB_Feld_RegAf_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="AGB",sub_rep="AGB_Feld_Reg",area="africa",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15, slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)

test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(AGB_Feld_RegAf_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "AGB" , sub_rep = "AGB_Feld_Reg", area="africa",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)

##South-America

#
AGB_Feld_RegSA_F=lm(AGB_Feld_Reg~., data=bestMEM_AGB_Feld_RegSA)
summary(AGB_Feld_RegSA_F)

rse<-summary(AGB_Feld_RegSA_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(AGB_Feld_RegSA_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_SA_AGB_Reg[,mean(AGB_Feld_Reg),]
results<-tidy(AGB_Feld_RegSA_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="AGB",sub_rep="AGB_Feld_Reg",area="south_america",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15, slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)

test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(AGB_Feld_RegSA_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "AGB" , sub_rep = "AGB_Feld_Reg", area="south_america",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)


##Asia 

#
AGB_Feld_RegAs_F=lm(AGB_Feld_Reg~., data=bestMEM_AGB_Feld_RegAs)
summary(AGB_Feld_RegAs_F)

rse<-summary(AGB_Feld_RegAs_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(AGB_Feld_RegAs_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_As_AGB_Reg[,mean(AGB_Feld_Reg),]
results<-tidy(AGB_Feld_RegAs_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="AGB",sub_rep="AGB_Feld_Reg",area="asia",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15, slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)

test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(AGB_Feld_RegAs_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "AGB" , sub_rep = "AGB_Feld_Reg", area="asia",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)



##oceania

#
AGB_Feld_RegOc_F=lm(AGB_Feld_Reg~., data=bestMEM_AGB_Feld_RegOc)
summary(AGB_Feld_RegOc_F)

rse<-summary(AGB_Feld_RegOc_F)$sigma
r_squared<-summary(AGB_Feld_RegOc_F)$r.squared
mean<-data_Oc_AGB_Reg[,mean(AGB_Feld_Reg),]
results<-tidy(AGB_Feld_RegOc_F, conf.int = TRUE)

setDT(results)
results<-as.data.table(t(results[2:8][p.value>=0.05,estimate:=NA]))

results<-row_to_names(results,row_number=1)
results[,`:=`(rep="AGB",sub_rep="AGB_Feld_Reg",area="oceania",r_squared=r_squared,RMSE=(rse/mean)*100,est=NA)]
results$est<-as.character(results$est)
results[1,est:="estimate"]
results[2,est:="std.error"]
results[3,est:="statistic"]
results[4,est:="p.value"]
results[5,est:="conf.low"]
results[6,est:="conf.high"]
end<-rbind(end,results[,.(rep, sub_rep, area,  Bio1, Bio12, Bio15, slope, sand, ph, org,r_squared,RMSE,est),])

rm(rse)
rm(mean)
rm(r_squared)
rm(results)

test<-as.data.table(as.numeric(summary(AGB_Feld_RegOc_F)$coefficients[,4]))
test<-test[2:8]
test[, `:=`(rep = "AGB" , sub_rep = "AGB_Feld_Reg", area="oceania",  pvalue=V1,var_pred=c("Bio1","Bio12","Bio15","slope","sand","ph","org"))][,V1:=NULL,]
end2<-rbind(end2,test)
rm(test)
```
##Export of the table

```{r}
end[,source:="WC",]
end2[,source:="WC",]

fwrite(end,"end_stand_WC.csv")
fwrite(end2,"end2_stand_WC.csv")


```

```{r}
```
